HERO.TITLE: ArtistFactory
HERO.DESCRIPTION_INTRO: Cozy, stylishly designed and always clean rehearsal rooms in the heart of the city center – so every practice session becomes an inspiring experience.
HERO.DESCRIPTION_DETAILS: ArtistFactory has been welcoming musicians and bands since 2007 in a friendly, professional environment where everything is available for undisturbed practice.

FEATURES.TITLE: What we offer
FEATURES.ROOMS_SPACIOUS_DESC: Our rooms comfortably accommodate 4–5 person bands, but we also have a larger room where up to 8–10 people can practice together.
FEATURES.PREMIUM_EQUIPMENT_DESC: Top-tier instruments and amplifiers (Orange, ENGL, Fender, Warwick, Ashdown, Line6, Yamaha) plus microphones (Shure Beta 57, Audio Technica) at no extra cost.
FEATURES.AIR_CONDITIONED_DESC: Stay cool in our fully air-conditioned rooms.

ROOMS.TITLE: Our Rehearsal Rooms
ROOMS.DESCRIPTION: Five stylish rehearsal rooms, professional environment — just bring your instrument, the atmosphere is provided.
ROOMS.LAST_MINUTE_DESC: Flexible? Book a rehearsal room up to 3 hours in advance and enjoy the discounted hourly rate! Fill our calendar gaps and practice for less!
ROOMS.INDIVIDUAL_DESC: Want to practice alone? You can rent a rehearsal room at a discounted rate to develop your skills undisturbed!
ROOMS.MORE_INFO_PROMPT: For more details, visit the rooms page!

PRICES.TITLE: Our Prices
PRICES.CTA_DESC: Book a time slot now and start making music!

CONTACT.TITLE: Visit our rehearsal space
CONTACT.DESC: Our entrance is in the gateway next to Pepco on Nagymező Street. You can ring the bell with the 'PróbaPont' button.
CONTACT.PUBLIC_TRANSPORT: Easily accessible by public transport: trams 2 and 2A, trolleybuses 70 and 78, buses 15 and 115, and the M3 metro are all 5 minutes away from our rehearsal space.

ACCESS.TITLE: Accessibility
ACCESS.TRAM: By tram: Come with tram 4-6 or tram 2 to Jászai Mari square /Margit bridge Pest side/, then walk on Pozsonyi street /McDonald's street/ and you can be with us in 2 minutes.
ACCESS.TROLLEY: By trolleybus: If you come with the 76 starting from Keleti, get off at Radnóti Miklós street stop /second to last/, from there it's just a few steps.
ACCESS.CAR: If you come by car, you can always find parking around the block. If you have a lot of gear, you can park in the courtyard parking in front of our entrance for loading.
ACCESS.ENTRANCE: You'll find the entrance from the parking courtyard behind the block. The block can be walked around, so you can come from anywhere.

BOOKING.TITLE: Booking
BOOKING.ORDER_DISCLAIM: You can cancel your reservation at any time up to 72 hours before the booked time slot. In case of cancellation within 72 hours, you must pay the full rental fee!

ALERT.FAIL: Failed booking :( Please try again later

CONFIRM_MODAL.TITLE: Confirm booking
CONFIRM_MODAL.CONTENT: Are you sure you want to finalize your bookings? After confirmation, the booking can only be cancelled up to 72 hours before the appointment.
